hero.subheadline: Universal Productivity Zone helps users learn skills, find jobs, manage teams, grow as freelancers, and work with AI-powered productivity tools in one personalized workspace.

problem.title: The fragmented tool problem
problem.subtitle: Professionals today juggle dozens of apps just to get work done.

solution.title: Everything you need, finally unified
solution.subtitle: UPZ brings together all the essential tools for professional growth and daily work into a single, cohesive environment designed to eliminate friction.

features.title: Powerful features for every professional
features.subtitle: Everything you need to work, learn, and grow, beautifully integrated.

items.title: Personalized Workspace
items.description: A tailored environment that adapts to your specific role, whether you're a developer, designer, or creator.

items.title: Chat System
items.description: Built-in communication tools for teams and clients, eliminating the need for external messaging apps.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Real-time analytics and overview of all your ongoing projects, tasks, and financial metrics.

items.title: Tasks & Notes
items.description: Powerful project management connected directly to your knowledge base.

items.title: Learning System
items.description: Integrated courses and skill-building paths tailored to your career goals.

items.title: Freelance & Hiring
items.description: Find jobs, hire talent, and manage contracts all within the same platform.

items.title: Content & Social Tools
items.description: Plan, schedule, and manage your content strategy across multiple channels.

items.title: Universal Bank
items.description: Manage invoices, payments, and financial tracking natively without external gateways.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.description: Context-aware AI that helps draft messages, plan projects, and summarize information.

steps.title: Set Your Profile
steps.desc: Choose your profession, goal, and experience level

steps.title: Get Your Workspace
steps.desc: Receive a fully personalized productivity environment

forWhom.title: Built for every professional
forWhom.subtitle: Whatever you do, UPZ adapts to you.

ai.title: Meet your AI productivity partner
ai.subtitle: Intelligent assistance for every part of your work life. From drafting emails to planning entire project lifecycles.

freelancer.title: Become a freelancer from zero
freelancer.subtitle: UPZ isn't just a freelance marketplace — it's the complete path from beginner to earning professional.

cta.title: Start building your future workspace today.
cta.subtitle: Join a platform designed for learning, working, collaboration, and professional growth.

footer.tagline: Universal Productivity Zone is the all-in-one workspace that replaces your scattered tools. Work, learn, and earn in one place.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Universal Productivity Zone. All rights reserved.

topbar.tagline: Build, learn, earn, and collaborate in one workspace.
topbar.commandReady: Command center search is ready for backend wiring.
topbar.noResults: No matching users, chats, tasks, or projects.
topbar.notificationsDesc: Project, chat, bank, and news updates
topbar.localOnly: Notification center is local-only for this MVP.

dashboard.description: Your UPZ command center brings together projects, chat, AI, teams, wallet, notifications, and workspace health in one clean operating view.
dashboard.heroTitle: Run the day from one calm, connected workspace.
dashboard.heroDesc: Start with chat QA, review the project demo path, confirm wallet states, then let AI generate a launch plan.
dashboard.agendaDesc: A compact timeline for the workday.
dashboard.nextActionsDesc: Clickable command cards make the MVP feel actionable without backend complexity.
dashboard.ecosystemDesc: Richer mock data for the full UPZ product system.
dashboard.weeklyActivityDesc: Tasks and messages across the product ecosystem.

commands.chatDesc: Pinned messages, search, reactions, and mobile navigation are ready for QA.
commands.projectDesc: Walk through command center, teams, projects, bank, and assistant surfaces.
commands.walletDesc: Freelance payment and pending payout states are visible in Universal Bank.
commands.aiDesc: Generate next steps for product launch, onboarding, and beta feedback.

chat.pinnedNotice: Pinned message preview stays local in this demo.
chat.historyClearedDesc: Send a new message to restart this local MVP conversation.
chat.noChatsLeftDesc: This is a local MVP demo. Refreshing after clearing localStorage will restore the mock chat set.
chat.noMessageFoundDesc: Try another keyword or close chat search to see every message.
chat.profilePlaceholder: {{name}} profile preview is a demo placeholder.
chat.forwardComposer: Forward placed in the composer for this MVP demo.

call.directVoiceDesc: A clean Telegram-like call surface with UPZ controls, local state, and no backend requirement.
call.groupVoiceDesc: Group voice calls use a calm stage, participant stack, and quick controls for team conversations.
call.telegramInspired: Familiar call UX, adapted to UPZ style

meetings.title: Lux video meetings for teams and client calls
meetings.description: A premium UPZ meeting room for instant calls, scheduled sessions, team syncs, screen sharing, and future calendar integration.
meetings.roomDesc: A familiar video-call layout adapted for UPZ: calm controls, participant tiles, agenda, links, and mock security states.
meetings.secureDemo: Local MVP video demo. No camera or backend required.
meetings.joinDesc: Paste a meeting code or use a demo room.
meetings.upcomingDesc: Team syncs, project reviews, and 1:1 client calls.
meetings.trustDesc: MVP placeholders for professional call controls.

privateRooms.title: Private rooms
privateRooms.desc: Meeting codes are local demo tokens.

hostControls.title: Host controls
hostControls.desc: Mute, remove, pin, and record placeholders.

meetings.agendaDesc: Keep calls focused with visible talking points.
meetings.agendaMeta: Ready for notes and follow-up tasks.
meetings.modalDesc: Create a demo meeting shell for future calendar integration.

toasts.linkCopied: Meeting link copied in demo state.

premium.title: Premium advantages for serious UPZ users
premium.description: Turn the MVP into a paid-product-ready experience with more AI, better meetings, deeper workspace controls, verified community status, and Universal Bank perks.
premium.heroTitle: {{name}}, unlock the stronger UPZ operating system.
premium.heroDesc: Premium is designed for users who work, learn, earn, and collaborate daily inside UPZ.
premium.whyDesc: These advantages create clear reasons to upgrade without making the free MVP feel broken.
premium.checkoutDesc: Frontend-only checkout preview for future payment integration.
premium.localOnly: Local MVP preview. No payment is processed.
premium.comparisonDesc: A simple product-ready structure for future billing and backend limits.

checkoutNotes.secure: Future-ready for Stripe, local cards, and Universal Bank.
checkoutNotes.demo: This button only shows a local demo toast.

toasts.checkout: Premium checkout is a local MVP preview.
toasts.compare: Comparison table is ready for backend limits.

ai.title: AI Power Mode
ai.description: Higher AI limits for planning, learning, writing, project ideas, and team summaries.

workspace.title: Advanced Workspace
workspace.description: Save custom layouts, premium project views, workspace templates, and deeper integrations.

meetings.title: Premium Meetings
meetings.description: Longer video calls, recording placeholders, agenda notes, and team meeting rooms.

bank.title: Universal Bank Plus
bank.description: Lower payout fee placeholders, freelance earning analytics, invoices, and local payment priority.

community.title: Verified Community
community.description: Premium badge, private channels, mentor rooms, boosted posts, and priority moderation.

support.title: Priority Support
support.description: Fast support lane, onboarding help, product guidance, and premium roadmap access.

free.name: Free
free.description: For trying UPZ and managing a light personal workspace.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For freelancers, students, creators, and solo builders who want more power.

team.name: Team
team.description: For teams that need roles, shared workspaces, analytics, and priority workflows.

home.description: Goal: {{goal}}. UPZ now connects your workspace, projects, community, news, wallet, teams, and AI assistant into one light productivity system.
home.quickActionsDesc: Fast entry points into the expanded UPZ ecosystem.
home.todaysTasksDesc: Simple task state still works locally while the product grows.
home.recentActivityDesc: Activity feed pattern for future backend events.

workspace.title: {{profession}} command center
workspace.description: Tabs, reorderable cards, integration placeholders, and layout controls extend the MVP workspace into a scalable user-customizable hub.
workspace.projectWorkspaceDesc: Drag cards to preview custom layout behavior. The order is local UI state in this MVP.

cards.reposDesc: 3 active repositories, 3 open pull requests, staging ready.
cards.tasksDesc: Sprint board with assignment, status, deadlines, and activity.
cards.filesDesc: Drive, docs, briefs, invoices, and project assets in one hub.
cards.calendarDesc: Upcoming standups, deadlines, learning blocks, and review sessions.

workspace.toolIntegrationsDesc: Backend-ready integration cards for GitHub, Drive, Slack, Calendar, and future providers.
workspace.layoutDesc: This tab demonstrates how a future backend can persist per-user workspace layouts, tab choices, hidden cards, and integration preferences.

community.title: Profession-based groups, channels, and discussions
community.description: Public communities give every UPZ user a place to learn, collaborate, moderate, and discover opportunities without leaving their workspace.
community.publicGroupsDesc: Join or leave profession spaces. Counts and membership are local UI state for the MVP.
community.moderationDesc: Keep communities clean with lightweight queues and role controls.
community.threadsDesc: Thread-like discussions for structured community conversations.
community.channelsDesc: Broadcast-style spaces inspired by channel workflows.
community.networkDepthDesc: More mock data for future segmentation, recommendations, and public discovery.
community.featuredCreatorsDesc: Community leaders, mentors, and public contributors.
community.postSystemDesc: A backend-ready composer and comments model, kept simple for the MVP demo.
community.postPlaceholder: Share a question, resource, or update with your group...

initialComments.onboarding: This would help onboarding a lot.
initialComments.rituals: Can we add a template for team rituals?

news.title: Personalized intelligence feed
news.description: A clean reading surface for profession-aware news, saved articles, trending topics, and lightweight article views.
news.articleViewDesc: A simple backend-ready article surface with save state.
news.productionBody: In a production UPZ backend, this view would support authors, sources, recommendations, and profession-based personalization. For the MVP, it demonstrates hierarchy, reading rhythm, and saved state without adding content infrastructure.

bank.title: Wallet, earnings, and payment history
bank.description: A finance-ready UI layer for freelance income, payouts, local payments, crypto placeholders, and subscription history.
bank.transactionsDesc: Payment history with statuses ready for real backend records.
bank.paymentRailsDesc: Crypto and local payment methods remain placeholders for MVP.

assistant.title: A productivity copilot for tasks, learning, and projects
assistant.description: The assistant is designed as an app-wide layer: chat, suggestions, learning support, project ideation, and future tool calls.
assistant.chatDesc: MVP chat surface with local demo responses.

messages.welcome: Hi, I can help turn your workspace into actions. Ask for task suggestions, learning help, or project ideas.
messages.focusPlan: Suggest a focus plan for this week.
messages.focusAnswer: Start with chat polish, then ship community moderation, then connect wallet history to projects.
messages.demoResponse: Demo response: I would connect to your tasks, projects, learning profile, and chat history once backend AI tools are available.

assistant.taskSuggestionsDesc: Context-aware prompts for the next backend iteration.

suggestions.createTasks: Create 5 tasks from my current projects
suggestions.learnNext: Explain what I should learn next

assistant.modesDesc: Simple, discoverable modes instead of a cluttered AI cockpit.

learning.title: Learning
learning.desc: Explain concepts and build study paths

assistant.ideaGeneratorDesc: More mock prompt/output examples for future backend tool calls.
assistant.learningPathsDesc: AI can later recommend adaptive learning paths based on profession, goals, and workspace activity.

teams.title: Create teams, assign roles, and link chats
teams.description: A scalable team layer for admins, members, dashboards, and team communication.
teams.dashboardDesc: A lightweight operating view for team health.
teams.linkedChatDesc: UPZ Core Team chat is connected to this dashboard for future backend activity sync.
teams.membersRolesDesc: Admin/member role display with add-member placeholder.
teams.modalDesc: Demo modal from the expanded component system.

projects.title: Kanban, assignment, deadlines, and activity
projects.description: A production-ready project surface that can later connect tasks, chat, team roles, files, and wallet invoices.
projects.kanbanDesc: Cards are arranged for drag-and-drop behavior. MVP uses static columns with hover affordances.
projects.assignmentDesc: Assign tasks to team members and roles.
projects.activityLogDesc: A future audit stream for every project action.
projects.modalDesc: Project modal placeholder for future backend integration.

tasksNotes.noTasks: No tasks yet. Add one above!

settings.integrationsIntro: Connect external services to enhance your workspace. No real credentials required in this demo.

integrations.github: Connect repos and track code activity
integrations.instagram: Track your IG analytics and schedule posts
integrations.youtube: Monitor channel stats and video performance
integrations.gdrive: Access and manage your Drive files

n1.title: MVP Feature List
n1.content: Dashboard, Chat, Tasks, Workspace, Profile, Settings. Keep it simple for v1.

n2.title: Design System Colors
n2.content:
Background: #F7FAFC
Cards: #FFFFFF
Border: #E5E7EB
Text: #111827
Accent: #6366F1 and #3B82F6

n3.title: Meeting Notes - Sprint 1
n3.content: Focus on landing page polish and internal app skeleton. Demo ready by Friday.

chatMessages.m1: Hey! Have you seen the new project specs?
chatMessages.m2: Yes, just checked them out. The scope feels tight enough for MVP.
chatMessages.m4: Can you review the PR before then?
chatMessages.m6: They look amazing! Love the color palette.
chatMessages.m7: Sprint review is tomorrow at 10 AM.
chatMessages.m8: I'll prepare the demo flow and keep it under seven minutes.
chatMessages.m10: Marketing brief sent to all stakeholders.
chatMessages.m11: Thanks everyone, great work this sprint! ??
chatMessages.m12: Wireframes attached in Figma. The hero CTA variant is the one to test.
chatMessages.m14: Anyone interested in a collab for this month?
chatMessages.m16: UX audit for a SaaS startup.
